title: 🤑 How to Apply for PM Mudra Loan Online in 2026: A Step-by-Step Guide 📈
metaTitle: PM Mudra Loan Online Application 2026 | Mudra Loan Apply Online
metaDescription: Learn how to apply for PM Mudra Loan online in 2026. Get step-by-step guidance on the online application process and eligibility criteria for Mudra Loan.
tableOfContents: Eligibility Criteria for PM Mudra Loan
Required Documents for PM Mudra Loan
Step-by-Step Guide to Apply for PM Mudra Loan Online

intro.heading: 🏦 Introduction to PM Mudra Loan
intro.content: The Pradhan Mantri MUDRA (Micro Units Development and Refinance Agency) Yojana, also known as PM Mudra Loan, is a government-backed scheme that provides financial assistance to small and micro entrepreneurs in India 🤑. The scheme was launched in 2015 with the objective of promoting entrepreneurship and job creation in the country. In this article, we will guide you on how to apply for PM Mudra Loan online in 2026.

sections.heading: 📝 Eligibility Criteria for PM Mudra Loan
sections.content: To be eligible for PM Mudra Loan, you must meet the following criteria: you should be an Indian citizen, your business should be a non-farm sector income-generating activity, your business should be in the manufacturing, trading, or service sector, and your business should require credit up to ₹10 lakhs. Additionally, you should have a good credit history and a viable business plan 📈.

sections.heading: 📁 Required Documents for PM Mudra Loan
sections.content: To apply for PM Mudra Loan, you will need to submit the following documents: identity proof (Aadhaar card, PAN card, etc.), address proof (passport, driving license, etc.), business registration documents (sole proprietorship declaration, partnership deed, etc.), income tax returns, and bank statements. You may also need to provide additional documents such as a business plan, projected balance sheet, and funding request 📊.

sections.heading: 📈 Step-by-Step Guide to Apply for PM Mudra Loan Online
sections.content: To apply for PM Mudra Loan online, follow these steps: visit the official website of the lender or the Udyami Mitra portal, fill out the online application form, upload the required documents, and submit the application. You will receive a confirmation message and a reference number once your application is submitted. The lender will then verify your application and documents, and if approved, the loan amount will be disbursed to your account 📈.

sections.heading: 🎉 Benefits of PM Mudra Loan
sections.content: The PM Mudra Loan scheme offers several benefits to small and micro entrepreneurs in India, including easy access to credit, low interest rates, and no collateral requirement. The scheme also provides a high loan amount of up to ₹10 lakhs, which can be used to meet various business needs such as working capital, equipment purchase, and business expansion. Additionally, the scheme offers a flexible repayment tenure of up to 5 years, making it easier for businesses to repay the loan 📊.

faqs.q: What is the interest rate for PM Mudra Loan?
faqs.a: The interest rate for PM Mudra Loan varies between 8.5% to 12.5% per annum, depending on the lender and the loan amount.

faqs.q: Can I apply for PM Mudra Loan online?
faqs.a: Yes, you can apply for PM Mudra Loan online through the official website of the lender or the Udyami Mitra portal.

faqs.q: What is the repayment tenure for PM Mudra Loan?
faqs.a: The repayment tenure for PM Mudra Loan is up to 5 years, depending on the loan amount and the lender.
